title: Kot Mumin Heat Wave
lead: Kot Mumin is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.34. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Kot Mumin has led to extremely high temperatures, resulting in a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 17.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 32%, which can exacerbate the perceived temperature. 
 The wind speed of 4.8 km/h offers little relief from the heat, making outdoor activities challenging.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
